fields.name: id
fields.description: Stable identifier for the word entry.

fields.name: word
fields.description: English word shown on the card front.

fields.name: meaning
fields.description: Chinese meaning shown on the card back.

fields.name: phonetic
fields.description: Phonetic symbol shown on the card back.

computedState.description: Size of the original loaded word set; constant for the session.
Length of the working review queue.
Number of words marked 认识 this session.
Whether the back face is currently shown.

persistenceRelevant: No persistence is required by the spec. All session state (queue order, known count, flip state) is in-memory and resets on app restart.

services.name: WordBankService
services.responsibility: Loads the current-stage word set. Implemented as an in-code ArkTS array (decision: hard-coded over rawfile JSON, per spec Open Question). Returns Word[] for the active learning stage.

services.name: ReviewController
services.responsibility: Owns the in-memory review session: working queue, known count, flip state. Exposes totalCount, remainingCount, knownCount, currentWord, isComplete, isFlipped plus markKnown, markUnknown, flipCard, restartSession.

states.name: reviewing
states.description: Queue non-empty; one card is shown. Sub-state per flip: front / back.

states.name: complete
states.description: Queue empty; completion state shown with restart action.

transitions.effect: Remove current word from queue; knownCount++; advance to next word; reset flip to front. -> complete when queue empties.
Move current word to bottom of queue; advance to next word; reset flip to front.
Reload word bank, rebuild queue, reset knownCount to 0, flip to front.

interactionFlows.name: mark-known-flow
steps: Reset flip to front for next card.
If queue empty -> isComplete true, show review-empty-state.
interactionFlows.expectedState: remainingCount decreased by 1; knownCount increased by 1.
interactionFlows.errorPath: If already complete, button is hidden (completion surface shown instead).

interactionFlows.name: mark-unknown-flow
steps: Controller.markUnknown(): move head to tail of queue.
interactionFlows.expectedState: remainingCount unchanged; knownCount unchanged; queue reordered.

interactionFlows.name: restart-flow
steps: Controller.restartSession(): reload WordBank, rebuild queue, reset knownCount.
Flip reset to front; return to reviewing state.

notes: Single-page app, no tabs (spec Non-Goals / Navigation Model). Index.ets is adapted to host ReviewPage only; the scaffold BottomTabBar/TabTypes/SvgIcon files are retained but unused.
Open Question resolution: word bank hard-coded in ArkTS (WordBankService) rather than rawfile JSON.
Open Question resolution: after mark-known / mark-unknown, the card auto-resets to the front face for the next word.
Persistence out of scope per spec; session is in-memory.
